job_description:
Service Delivery Manager (Cloud Infrastructure & IT Operations)

Job Purpose

We seek an experienced Service Delivery Manager (SDM) with deep expertise in IT operations, cloud infrastructure management, and AI-driven modernization. The SDM will lead end-to-end service delivery governance, operational excellence, and strategic leadership for cloud-hosted infrastructure, ensuring high availability, reliability, and performance. The ideal candidate has 12+ years of progressive experience in IT service delivery, cloud operations, and team leadership, with a strategic mindset to drive AI-led modernization.

Job Description / Duties and Responsibilities

Service Delivery & Governance - Own end-to-end service delivery for cloud infrastructure and managed operations. - Define, monitor, and enforce SLAs, SLOs, and KPIs. - Govern ITIL-based processes (Incident, Problem, Change, Release Management). - Conduct service reviews, QBRs, and governance cadences with stakeholders. - Proactively manage escalations and track CSAT/NPS metrics.

Cloud Infrastructure Management - Oversee 24x7 cloud operations (Azure/AWS/GCP) for high availability. - Govern infrastructure health, security compliance, and FinOps practices. - Collaborate on cloud migrations, cost optimization, and modernization initiatives.

IT Operations & Team Leadership - Lead cross-functional teams (L1/L2/L3) and 24x7 shift operations. - Drive operational maturity via runbooks, SOPs, and RCA for incident prevention.

Stakeholder & Commercial Management - Manage senior client relationships and present performance reports. - Coordinate contract reviews, vendor management, and account growth.

AI-Led Modernization & Innovation - Define AI/ML roadmaps for infrastructure automation and predictive operations. - Champion AIOps, IaC, GitOps, and shift-left strategies for proactive operations.

Job Specification / Skills and Competencies

Must Have - 12+ years in IT service delivery/operations, with 5+ years in cloud/IT ops. - Strong ITIL v3/v4 knowledge and 24x7 NOC experience. - Hands-on ITSM platform experience (ServiceNow/Remedy). - Excellent stakeholder communication and executive presentation skills.

Good to Have - Azure/AWS/GCP certifications (e.g., AZ-104, AZ-305, AWS SysOps). - ITIL 4/Managing Professional, PMP/PRINCE2/SAFe Agilist certifications. - AIOps/SRE/FinOps experience; DevOps/DevSecOps familiarity.

  • ITIL 4 Foundation/Managing Professional
